title: Bitter Malaysian Cinnamon Soup
description: A silky, deeply bitter Malaysian soup featuring fermented ingredients and a hint of cinnamon, perfect for midnight cravings. Vegetarian-friendly and subtly tangy.

ingredients.name: fermented rice water
ingredients.notes: fermented for 24 hours at room temperature

ingredients.name: coconut milk
ingredients.:: // This is a mistake in the template, should be a string for amount, but the template shows it incorrectly as a string with colon. We'll fix it to

instructions: Bring fermented rice water to a gentle boil in a medium pot.
Add cinnamon stick and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in coconut milk and jaggery until dissolved.
Remove from heat, add lime juice, and let cool for 5 minutes.
Strain through a fine-mesh sieve to remove solids, resulting in a silky, bitter soup.
